name: CH32V305CCT6
description: Generated from the WCH CH32V305 parser pipeline for CH32V305CCT6 LQFP48(V305CCT6). Includes synthesized routing extracted from Table 3-1 CH32V303/305/307 pin definitions. CH32V305CCT6 is a CH32V305 MCU in a 48-pin LQFP48(V305CCT6) package. This generated definition includes 37 peripheral blocks covering ADC with 16 input channels, CAN, 2 I2C buses, 4 op-amps, USB full-speed, 3 SPI buses, and 8 serial ports.
